title: stegnospermataceae
intro: The Stegnospermataceae rank refers to a small family of flowering plants. It is a family within the broader classification of plant taxonomy, encompassing a group of closely related species that share distinct characteristics. Stegnospermataceae plants are typically found in tropical and subtropical regions, with a limited global distribution. This family consists of a few genera, each containing one or more species, contributing to the overall diversity of plant life.
